news.summary: On Friday morning, the president took to social media to warn Apple and the European Union about potential increases in tariffs. He expressed frustration over stalled trade negotiations with the EU. The president's message indicates escalating tensions with important implications for trade relations.
news.headline: President escalates tariff threats, targeting Europe & Apple. Higher tariffs may be imposed amid stalled trade talks.

CCTC is a top-tier shallow bay industrial project that has been eagerly awaited, showcasing cutting-edge technology and premium amenities.

news.summary: A new daily supplement called Plus B has been introduced by Vytanutra in Irvine, Calif., on May 23, 2025. This supplement aims to enhance sustained energy, mental clarity, and overall wellness. It is specifically tailored for individuals looking to maintain consistent daily performance. Plus B offers a comprehensive formula to support its users.
news.headline: Vytanutra releases Plus B supplement for sustained energy and wellness. Designed for consistent daily performance.

news.summary: A recent report on the construction market in Singapore, covering the period up to Q1 2025, indicates a positive outlook. The industry is expected to experience a 4.1% growth in real terms for the year. This growth is primarily attributed to increased investments in various sectors such as commercial, residential, and transportation infrastructure. The report, available through ResearchAndMarkets.com, provides detailed analysis by sector including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. This growth signifies a promising market trend for the construction industry in Singapore.
news.headline: Singapore's construction industry is projected to grow by 4.1% in 2025, with increasing investments in commercial, housing, and transport projects.

news.summary: In Chicago on May 23, 2025, The Real Seal Basement Waterproofing and Foundation Repair, a reputable company specializing in basement waterproofing and foundation repair, has introduced a new community-driven program. The initiative involves offering free basement waterproofing inspections to homeowners across the area.
news.headline: Real Seal offers free basement waterproofing inspections for Chicago residents. Date: May 23, 2025.

news.summary: OsteoStrong, a renowned provider of science-based technology for strengthening bones, is introducing its innovative skeletal strength conditioning services to the Midwest with a new outlet in Woodbury, Minnesota. This expansion, unveiled on May 23, 2025, aims to provide residents with advanced, non-pharmaceutical solutions for enhancing bone health.
news.headline: OsteoStrong opens new location in Woodbury, MN, bringing skeletal strengthening technology to the Midwest. May 23, 2025.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, MINT Income Fund (TSX: MID.UN) disclosed its plan to initiate a normal course issuer bid (NCIB) after obtaining approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). The NCIB will be carried out through the TSX and Alternative Canadian Trading Systems, starting on May 27, 2025, and concluding on May 26, 2026. As per the Fund's Declaration of Trust, market acquisitions under the NCIB may be conducted by the Fund.
news.headline: MINT Income Fund (TSX: MID.UN) announces normal course issuer bid starting May 27, 2025, ending May 26, 2026.

news.summary: Clip Money Inc., a company trading under TSX-V: CLIP and OTCQB: CLPMF, has released its financial results for the three-month period ending on March 31, 2025. They have observed a significant uptick in revenue, showing a growth of 225% compared to the first quarter of 2024. Meanwhile, their cost of revenues experienced a more modest increase of 35% during the same period. This has resulted in the company maintaining a high operating leverage as they transition into the new year, showcasing strong performance in their operations.
news.headline: Clip Money Inc. saw revenue increase by 225% in Q1 2025 compared to Q1 2024, with operating costs rising by only 35%.

news.summary: The Open Gear Lubricants Market was valued at USD 738.1 million in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 907.9 million by 2030, with a projected CAGR of 3.5% between 2024 and 2030. Factors driving the market growth include increased demand from various industries, growth in bio-based lubricants, adoption of synthetic base oil, and technological advancements in lubrication monitoring. The market is primarily being fueled by the mining and construction sectors, along with improved living standards. However, factors hindering growth include the impact of geopolitical issues, economic slowdown, and challenges in lubricant application and usage efficiency. Key players in the market include FUCHS SE, Kluber Lubrications, Carl Bechem GmbH, CWS Industrials, Inc., and Shell plc. The study also highlights the opportunities and challenges in the market, with a focus on balancing cost and performance. For more information, readers can access the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Global Open Gear Lubricants Market to reach $907.9 million by 2030 at 3.5% CAGR, driven by demand from industries.

Morgan Energy, Power & Renewables Conference on June 24 (venue unspecified).
news.headline: Everus Construction Group (NYSE: ECG) to attend multiple investor conferences, including KeyBanc and Stifel, during May and June.

news.summary: In Kirkland, Washington, a community event will be held on June 7, 2025, from 1-3PM for cyclists and families in the Seattle and Eastside region. The event will take place outside the Flatbike bike shop in the Totem Lake area of Kirkland. Participants can look forward to games, prizes, and bike-related activities in a safe and tranquil environment.
news.headline: Flatbike in Kirkland, WA hosting Family Fun Day on June 7 from 1-3PM, featuring games and prizes for cyclists.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, in New York, a study highlighted the significance of emotional wellness, indicating cats as key contributors to household harmony. The research, featured in the Journal of Psychiatric Research, revealed that individuals owning cats were 36% less prone to reporting feelings of distress. This demonstrates the valuable role cats play in improving emotional well-being during a crucial period.
news.headline: Dr. Elsey's supports emotional bond between cats & people as they prove to enhance household harmony; Cat owners are 36% less likely to report negative feelings, study finds.

news.summary: Ninon Lizé Masclef has been granted a fellowship worth $100,000 by O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC (OSV) based in Greenwich, Connecticut. The purpose of this fellowship is for Lizé to utilize brain-wave data to create 3D representations of dreams. This prestigious grant highlights OSV's support for innovative creators and their projects.
news.headline: O'Shaughnessy Ventures invests $100,000 in dream reconstruction AI project creating 3D dreams from brain-wave data.

news.summary: Oak Harvest Financial Group (OHFG), a Registered Investment Advisory (RIA) firm located in Houston, is providing assistance to companies that provide employee retirement plans through their specialized service, Oak Harvest 401(k) Business Services. This service aids in risk mitigation, cost reduction, performance enhancement, and maintaining fiduciary compliance. The news was announced on May 23, 2025, without disclosing the specific source. Companies utilizing Oak Harvest 401(k) Business Services can expect support in managing their employee retirement plans effectively and securely.
news.headline: Oak Harvest Financial Group offers new retirement plan administration for Houston businesses, aiming to reduce costs and enhance performance.

news.summary: Located in Beckley, West Virginia, Pangino is a watch brand that prides itself on disrupting routine with unique timepieces, marrying conventional elements with modernity. Dubbed as an "Italian-American" business, Pangino is recognized for its commitment to defying predictability through innovative designs. Established in 2025, the company has quickly gained traction for its distinct watches that aim to break the mold. With a clear mission to challenge the norm and introduce fresh perspectives, Pangino continues to make waves in the industry.
news.headline: Pangino is a watch company blending tradition with innovation, rejecting monotony. Based in Beckley, W.Va since May 23, 2025.

news.summary: In St. Louis, the sale of Benson Hill's business assets to Confluence Genetics, LLC has been approved by the United States Bankruptcy Court.
news.headline: Confluence Genetics buys Benson Hill assets in chapter 11 sale approved by US Bankruptcy Court.

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) revealed the launch of an offer to exchange any and all certain outstanding senior notes of United States Cellular Corporation (USCC). This initiative was undertaken together with its wholly-owned subsidiary, T-Mobile USA, Inc. The announcement comes following the Securities Purchase Agreement unveiled on May 24, 2024, wherein the Company committed to acquiring specific assets from USCC. This move marks a significant step in the agreement, showcasing the Company's strategic business decisions.
news.headline: T-Mobile US, Inc. starts Exchange Offers for US Cellular Corp.’s senior notes to purchase assets; announced on May 24, 2024.

news.summary: In Bonita Springs, Florida, Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) has revealed an extension of their tender offer to purchase all outstanding shares of H&E Equipment Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: HEES). The offer includes $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc common stock for each H&E share, as per the terms of the merger agreement dated February 1. This latest development does not include interest and continues the acquisition at the specified terms.
news.headline: Herc Holdings extends tender offer to acquire H&E Equipment Services for $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, in Oklahoma City, Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC, serving as the investment adviser of the Fund, proposed the termination and liquidation of the Range Global Offshore Oil fund. This move signifies the end of the fund's operations, and investors will need to consider their options following this decision.

It can accommodate up to two light pads or three light tampons for menstrual flow management.
news.headline: RedDrop introduces period swimwear for teens and tweens, in sizes Youth XS to Women's XL, can hold up to 2 pads or 3 tampons.

news.summary: In a significant development, a cross-border transaction has been completed to bolster Unikomm's position as a key player in the digital transformation sector in the Gulf region. Tequity, a prominent M&A Advisory firm based in North America and focusing on Enterprise B2B SaaS products and services companies, facilitated this milestone deal. This transaction highlights Unikomm's growing influence in the Gulf region's digital landscape and represents a strategic move for the company. The specific financial figures of the transaction were not disclosed, but it is expected to have a considerable impact on Unikomm's market presence and capabilities.
news.headline: Tequity's client Unikomm, a ServiceNow Elite Partner, acquired by Plat4mation, in a milestone transaction. Strengthened leadership in Gulf's digital transformation.

(Nasdaq: ALLO), a biotech firm advancing allogeneic CAR T (AlloCAR T™) products for cancer and autoimmune disease, shared plans to engage in four investor conferences in May and June. news.summary: In Toronto on May 23, 2025, Martinrea International Inc. (TSX: MRE) revealed its plan of initiating a normal course issuer bid (NCIB), which has been approved by the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). Under the NCIB, Martinrea is authorized to buy back and cancel a maximum of 7,110,571 common shares ("Shares") within a year. This figure accounts for about 10% of the public float, which stands at 71,105,709 shares presently in circulation.
news.headline: Martinrea International Inc. approved to buy back up to 7,110,571 shares, 10% of public float, in 12 months.

news.summary: Autolus Therapeutics has received a favorable opinion from the CHMP regarding the use of Obecabtagene Autoleucel in adult patients aged 26 and above who are experiencing relapsed or refractory B-ALL. This positive development signals a significant advancement in treatment options for this specific patient population.
news.headline: Autolus Therapeutics gets positive CHMP opinion for Obecabtagene Autoleucel in adults (26+) with R/R B-ALL.

news.summary: Mark Yusko, founder and CIO of Morgan Creek Capital, expressed his belief that the Bitcoin rally is ongoing, with the cryptocurrency reaching a new all-time high of nearly $111,000. Yusko attributed Bitcoin's upward trend to structural factors and a shift in how the global economy views money, emphasizing that the continuous rise in all-time highs should not be surprising. He highlighted the significant devaluation of fiat currencies, noting that 80% of all dollars were printed in the last five years. Unlike traditional assets tied to GDP growth and inflation, Yusko stated that Bitcoin's performance is driven by technology, adoption among younger generations, and changes in fiat currencies. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Mark Yusko of Morgan Creek Capital predicts Bitcoin rally will continue, citing structural forces. Bitcoin hits new high near $111,000. Yusko notes rapid devaluation of fiat currencies, says 80% of all dollars printed in last 5 years. Bitcoin not linked to GDP, inflation.

news.summary: A report on the China Data Center Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection, indicating significant growth opportunities. The market was valued at USD 47.23 billion in 2024 and is estimated to reach USD 97.30 billion by 2030, showcasing a steady growth rate with a CAGR of 12.8%. Key players in this market include China Telecom, China Mobile, China Unicom, Chayora, GDS Services, Chindata Group, Dr. Peng's Telecom and Media Group, Shanghai Atrium (athub) and China International Capital C.
news.headline: China's data center market is projected to double by 2030, reaching $97.30 billion from $47.23 billion in 2024, growing at a CAGR of 12.8%.

news.summary: President Trump's threat to impose a 50% tariff on all European Union imports from June 1 led to a selloff in European markets, causing concerns of a potential transatlantic trade war amid global economic pressures. Trump blamed the EU for a $250 billion annual trade deficit due to various trade barriers and taxes. The proposed tariff, set to exempt US-manufactured goods, could disrupt EU exporters and global supply chains. European markets reacted immediately: Euro STOXX 50 index dropped 3%, Italy's FTSE MIB fell 2.9%, France's CAC 40 lost 2.6%, and Spain's IBEX 35 declined by 2.2%. Germany's DAX also saw a negative impact. The full article can be read on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trump threatens 50% tariff on EU imports, causing European markets to plunge. EU trade deficit exceeds $250 billion.

news.summary: Impossible Cloud Network (ICN), the top decentralized cloud network in Web3, has secured a significant investment from NGP Capital, a renowned tech venture capital firm. This investment comes as ICN aims to expand its services and reach. The agreement was finalized on May 23, 2025, in ZUG, Switzerland. NGP Capital, known for its previous successful investments, is optimistic about the potential growth of ICN. The specific amount of the investment and the details of the expansion plans were not disclosed.
news.headline: ICN receives investment from NGP Capital at $470m valuation to expand decentralized cloud services.

news.summary: The President is urging Apple to manufacture the iPhone within the U.S. or risk a 25% tariff, amid stalled discussions with the European Union. Dow Jones Futures have plummeted in response to Trump's warning of potential tariffs - 25% on Apple and 50% on the EU.
news.headline: Dow Jones Futures drop due to Trump's threat of 25% tariff on Apple and 50% on EU. Apple urged to manufacture in the U.S.

news.summary: On Friday, Dow Jones futures experienced a sell-off following remarks by President Donald Trump on tariffs, resulting in a decline of 600 points. Apple's stock also took a hit on the market today.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures plummet 600 points due to Trump tariff remarks, Apple stock drops.
